positive: Highly detailed, symmetrical mandala featuring bioluminescent tropical flora and abstract celestial geometry. The design should utilize strong, defined silhouettes and interlocking patterns, evoking a feeling of mystical calm and harmony. Color palette is deep sapphire blue, vibrant emerald green, and luminous gold accents, set against a solid negative space background. Style is a fusion of Art Nouveau and sacred geometry, minimalist vector illustration, high contrast, clean edges, perfect for screen printing on apparel, centered composition, ornate.
